⏰ Diet Schedule

The backend sends a dispense_food command at each enabled time. Each execution creates an app alert and Telegram notification.

Leave blank to skip.
Leave blank to skip.

🧪 Test Scheduled Feeding

Send a dispense_food command immediately using the saved grams value. Save the schedule first, then use this button. MQTT must be connected.
